content:
We're Hiring | Legal Internship (Freelance Basis) ⚖️

Ardh Sainik Legal Associates is inviting applications for a Legal Internship (Freelance Basis) from law students and fresh law graduates based in Uttar Pradesh and Bihar.

If you're looking to gain practical legal experience, enhance your research and drafting skills, and work on real legal assignments with flexibility, we'd love to hear from you.

📍 Location: Uttar Pradesh & Bihar
📞 Call / WhatsApp: 9990060527 / 8800001248

Apply now and take the next step in your legal career with Ardh Sainik Legal Associates.

#Hiring #LegalInternship #FreelancingInternship #LawStudents #LawGraduates #LegalJobs #LegalCareer #InternshipOpportunity #UPJobs #BiharJobs #ArdhSainikLegalAssociates #LegalResearch #LegalDrafting #CareerOpportunity
comment: For legal internships, exposure to case strategy, client communication, and feedback loops often matters as much as assignments; structured mentorship can turn short engagements into real skill-building.
